title: Handle and store explosives
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Handle and store explosives demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for the handling of explosives

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement controls for handling, storage and transport of explosives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement controls for handling, storage and transport of explosives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement controls for handling, storage and transport of explosives.

pcs.text: Check for damaged or defective explosives and take action according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check for damaged or defective explosives and take action according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check for damaged or defective explosives and take action according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Prepare and display signage and placarding on vehicles or storage facilities for explosives according to legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and display signage and placarding on vehicles or storage facilities for explosives according to legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and display signage and placarding on vehicles or storage facilities for explosives according to legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Identify and implement emergency procedures for the transportation, handling and storage of explosives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and implement emergency procedures for the transportation, handling and storage of explosives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and implement emergency procedures for the transportation, handling and storage of explosives.

pcs.text: Establish monitoring and recording systems for authorisation to handle, store and transport explosives according to codes of practice and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish monitoring and recording systems for authorisation to handle, store and transport explosives according to codes of practice and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish monitoring and recording systems for authorisation to handle, store and transport explosives according to codes of practice and legislative and regulatory requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for the handling of explosives

elements.title: Transport explosives

pcs.text: Establish arrangements to maintain integrity and security of transported explosives according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish arrangements to maintain integrity and security of transported explosives according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish arrangements to maintain integrity and security of transported explosives according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Institute security procedures to ensure explosives arrive at the destination intact and within specified times
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Institute security procedures to ensure explosives arrive at the destination intact and within specified times?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Institute security procedures to ensure explosives arrive at the destination intact and within specified times.

pcs.text: Implement workplace strategies to carry out emergency procedures according to legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement workplace strategies to carry out emergency procedures according to legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement workplace strategies to carry out emergency procedures according to legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Load and transport explosives safely according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Load and transport explosives safely according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Load and transport explosives safely according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Transport explosives

elements.title: Store explosives

pcs.text: Define and action the requirements for the safe and secure storage of explosives according to legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define and action the requirements for the safe and secure storage of explosives according to legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define and action the requirements for the safe and secure storage of explosives according to legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Define requirements for personnel authorised to gain access to explosives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define requirements for personnel authorised to gain access to explosives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define requirements for personnel authorised to gain access to explosives.

pcs.text: Assess storage conditions to ensure they meet requirements for safe storage of explosives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess storage conditions to ensure they meet requirements for safe storage of explosives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess storage conditions to ensure they meet requirements for safe storage of explosives.

pcs.text: Monitor and maintain security according to legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and maintain security according to legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and maintain security according to legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Accurately implement and maintain recording systems for the handling and storage of explosives according to legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Accurately implement and maintain recording systems for the handling and storage of explosives according to legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Accurately implement and maintain recording systems for the handling and storage of explosives according to legislative and regulatory requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Store explosives

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
